title: Rename sweep — root + portfolio-facing docs (the front door)
description: Fix all three stale Fabric artifact names (semantic_model_oeminsightbi→OEMInsightBI_v2, clean_columnsAndHeaders.Notebook→bronze-to-silver.Notebook, report.Report→report2.Report) in the highest-visibility, recruiter-facing surfaces. One pass per file fixes every stale name in it. Part of the task-021 sweep (audit C-01).
acceptanceCriteria: README.md directory tree (lines ~33-36) shows the three on-disk names: `bronze-to-silver.Notebook`, `OEMInsightBI_v2.SemanticModel`, `report2.Report` (currently shows all three OLD names).

project_definition.md active references updated: Semantic Model (~L75/L723) → OEMInsightBI_v2; Power BI Report (~L823/L1474) → report2.Report; cleaning-notebook refs (~L327/L653/L857) → bronze-to-silver. Judgment: the naming-convention EXAMPLE at ~L1031 ('Examples: clean_columnsAndHeaders.Notebook, silver-to-gold2.Notebook') — update to a real current notebook or keep as a convention illustration with a 'renamed' note; record the choice.
docs/README.md (~L39 semantic-model link) and docs/portfolio/PORTFOLIO_ASSETS_README.md (~L11/L33 report paths, ~L55 semantic model) updated.

BEFORE re-pathing PORTFOLIO_ASSETS_README.md's `/fabric/report.Report/CASE_STUDY.md` and `/fabric/report.Report/PORTFOLIO_DESIGN.md`: verify those files exist under `fabric/report2.Report/` — if they don't exist anywhere, flag as a separate broken-path issue rather than pointing at a missing file.
Every replaced path verified to exist on disk (no new broken links).
notes: Full context: parent task-021 + audit C-01 (.claude/support/audits/coherence-2026-06-21-2141/findings.md#C-01).
DISK TRUTH: fabric/OEMInsightBI_v2.SemanticModel/, fabric/bronze-to-silver.Notebook/, fabric/report2.Report/ are canonical; old names live ONLY under fabric/archive/.

Per-file judgment: these are mostly active descriptive refs — straightforward to update — EXCEPT the project_definition.md naming-convention example noted above. Do not touch any line that explicitly says the old name was 'archived'.

--- IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-21 (implement-agent, completed) --- Swept 3 renames across README/project_definition.md/docs/README.md/PORTFOLIO_ASSETS_README.md. grep-first found extra occurrences beyond audit hints (all fixed); all new paths verified on disk. JUDGMENT: project_definition.md L1031 naming-example KEPT with '(since renamed to bronze-to-silver)' annotation (replacing it would contradict the adjacent 'uses both underscores and hyphens' note). DISCOVERY: PORTFOLIO CASE_STUDY.md/PORTFOLIO_DESIGN.md were mispathed to /fabric/report.Report/ but actually live at docs/portfolio/ -> re-pathed to real location (NOT report2.Report). Flagged separate content-drift: _Measures.tmdl has no v2 equivalent (measures reorganized to per-table .tmdl) -> FR-002 (open).
